title: ilex havilandii
intro: Ilex havilandii, also known as the Philippine holly or Filipino holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural source of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory agents, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ilex havilandii include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
